effect.subject: tok_lisraya_color_coral
effect.reserved_for: sparing tertiary accent only (never primary CTAs, headlines, or data)

rule_text: Coral is a sparing tertiary accent only — never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data. [GENERAL] Avoid Coral in email sections unless the brief calls for it.
intent: Limit Coral to rare accents so it never competes with primary brand color.
summary: Use coral sparingly as a tertiary accent; never for primary CTAs, headlines, data, or email sections unless specified by the brief.
